{
  "claims": [
    "Autism Spectrum Disorder is the fastest growing developmental disability in the United States.",
    "Seventeen years ago, one in 150 children were born with Autism Spectrum Disorder; now that figure is one in 68.",
    "Unemployment for young adults with autism is estimated at 90 percent nationwide.",
    "A fundamental component contributing to low employment numbers for young adults with Autism Spectrum Disorder is a lack of understanding of the disability itself.",
    "Proper education, outreach, and training of employers can help them take affirmative action to recruit, hire, promote, and retain individuals with autism."
  ]
